item.title: A Survey of Rust Strings
item.author: Newton Ni
item.description: Why does Rust have so many string types? How are they different, when should we use each one, and do they have analogues in other programming languages?

item.title: Black-box Concurrent Data Structures for NUMA Architectures
item.author: Newton Ni
item.description: This paper [1] recognizes how NUMA architectures are similar to distributed systems--namely, the high cost of synchronization between nodes/hosts, respectively--and essentially applies state machine replication to in-memory data structures. The primary contribution is a NUMA-aware shared log.
